title: Bend So Low
lyric:
[Verse 1]
Step in the room, make space
Heel to toe, nice pace
Wine slow, then spin fast
Everybody want that last
Bend low, let it show
Catch the groove and let it go
[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, now release
Body move, find the heat
One more step, don't stop
Feel that pressure rise up
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know
[Verse 2]
Fresh fit, clean cut
Bassline shake, back up
Hands up, then dip down
Make the whole place turn around
Side to side, never bored
Watch your name get called for sure
[Pre-Chorus]
Hold tight, now release
Body move, find the heat
One more step, don't stop
Feel that pressure rise up
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know
[Bridge]
Touch the floor, come back clean
Make it slick, make it mean
One breath, then you break
Whole place jumping when you shake
[Chorus]
Bend so low, bend so low
Bend so low, let it go
Bend so low, bend so low
Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)
Bend so low, bend so low
When you drop, everybody know

One breath, then you break

Move that waist, steal the show
(steal the show)

When you drop, everybody know
tags: Dancehall with uptempo dembow bounce, skittering hi-hats, punchy kick-snare, and rubbery sub-bass; verse stays clipped and percussive, pre-chorus strips to drums and bass with rising chants, chorus lands with big crowd hooks and bright synth stabs. Lead vocal is gritty and close-mic with doubled hook lines, ad-lib throws, and gang vocals on the chant. Ear candy: reverse cymbal lifts, bass drops before the chorus, and little horn pops between phrases. Mix is loud, glossy, and hard-hitting.
